how.revenueTitle: How does the platform make money?
how.revenueText: Space owners — malls, companies, and schools — subscribe to a monthly plan to list their spaces and reach tenants. That's our only source of revenue. As a tenant, you use the platform completely free.

owner.heroPill: For mall, club, school, and company owners
owner.heroH1:
Have a spare space?
Turn it into steady income
owner.heroSub: Sign up — pick your plan — list your space. A simple monthly subscription, no hidden commissions.
owner.modelVal: Fixed monthly subscription for the space owner
owner.tenantVal: Browsing and booking are completely free
owner.bazaarsVal: 10% of every booking through the platform
owner.path1Sub: Subscribe to a plan ← list your spaces ← receive tenants
owner.path1Step1: Create an account — free and quick, no commitment
owner.path1Step2: Request to switch to a space-owner account — our team reviews requests within 24 hours
owner.path1Step3: Choose a plan that fits your space — Starter is free for up to two spaces
owner.path1Step4: List your spaces and start receiving booking requests from tenants
owner.limitStarter: Starter is free — up to 2 spaces · 16m² max per space
owner.limitGrowth: Growth 3,000 EGP/month — up to 8 spaces + ERP + marketing
owner.limitPro: Pro 4,500 EGP/month — unlimited + account manager + AI photography
owner.path2Title: Organize a Bazaar at Your Venue
owner.path2Sub: Turn your space into a seasonal event — we handle the management and marketing
owner.path2Step1: You need a space-owner account first (see path 1 above)
owner.path2Step2: Request to switch to a bazaar-organizer account — from the dashboard or via WhatsApp
owner.path2Step3: We'll review your request and confirm the venue and capacity within 48 hours
owner.path2Step4: You can publish your bazaars from the dashboard — setting the dates, spots, and prices
owner.feesRow2Label: Full organizing with the Makani team
owner.feesNote: The plan's monthly subscription covers listing the space — the bazaar has a separate fee structure
owner.createBazaarBtn: Create a Bazaar from the Dashboard
owner.path3Title: Join a Bazaar as a Vendor
owner.path3Sub: Book your spot in an existing bazaar — fast, with no long-term commitment
owner.vendorStep1: Choose a bazaar that fits your business from the bazaars page
owner.vendorStep2: Book your spot directly from the interactive map
owner.vendorStep3: Pay the spot fee — it varies by bazaar and organizer
owner.vendorStep4: You'll receive a confirmation message with the event details
owner.vendorNote: Fees: set by the bazaar's management — Makani Spot only takes 10% of bookings completed through the platform.
owner.finalCtaTitle: Have a question? Reach out now
owner.finalCtaSub: We reply within an hour · Saturday to Thursday · 9am to 11pm
owner.finalCtaNote: No upfront payment · Starter is completely free · Cancel anytime

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What's the difference between Growth and Pro?
faq.a1: Growth gives you the tools to run things yourself. Pro gives you an account manager who runs it for you — with a monthly AI report and a live review.
faq.q2: Can I change my plan later?
faq.a2: Yes, you can upgrade anytime. There are no long-term contracts — everything is monthly, and you can switch whenever you want.
faq.q3: What does the "16m² limit" mean on Starter and Growth?
faq.a3: Every space you list must be 16m² or smaller. Larger spaces are available on Pro, with an account manager to help you list them.
faq.q4: Is the 8% commission calculated after any discount?
faq.a4: The commission is calculated only on the actual value of a completed contract — not on any negotiations or incomplete offers.
faq.q5: Is there a free trial for Growth?
faq.a5: Starter is completely free to try. Growth and Pro start with a conversation with us to make sure the plan fits your space and needs.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to Transform Your Spaces?
ctaBanner.sub: Start with Starter for free — or talk to us to pick the right plan for you
